ddls:
CREATE TABLE "anime_series" (
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime series */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the anime series */,
  "name" TEXT /* English name of the anime series */,
  "japanese_name" TEXT /* Japanese name of the anime series */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of anime series (e.g., TV, Movie, Web) */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the series */,
  "studio" TEXT /* Studio that produced the anime */,
  "release_season" TEXT /* Season when the anime was released */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the anime (genres, themes) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the anime series */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the anime was released */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the anime series ended (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the anime series */,
  "content_warning" TEXT /* Content warnings associated with the anime */,
  "source_material" TEXT /* Source material of the anime (e.g., manga, light novel) */,
  "source_material_id" TEXT /* ID or reference to the source material */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Name of the writer or writers */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer or producers */,
  "licensor" TEXT /* Name of the licensor for the anime */,
  "related_series" TEXT /* JSON array of related series IDs */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the official trailer */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL to the official website */,
  "streaming_platforms" TEXT /* JSON array of streaming platforms where the anime is available */,
  "recommended_age" INTEGER /* Recommended age for the content */,
  "user_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views by users */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* A score indicating the popularity of the anime */,
  "critic_score" REAL /* A score given by critics */,
  "awards_won" TEXT /* JSON array of awards won by the anime */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the voice actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the voice actor in the anime */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series the voice actor is associated with */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character the voice actor plays */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "character_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the character's image */,
  "voice_language" TEXT /* Language in which the voice actor performs (e.g., Japanese, English) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_actors_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Director, Writer) */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series the staff member is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the industry */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* JSON array of notable works of the staff member */,
  "staff_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the staff member's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the anime series by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating (e.g., 1-5, 1-10) */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or short description */,
  "favorite_genres" TEXT /* JSON array of favorite genres */,
  "watchlist" TEXT /* JSON array of anime series in the user's watchlist */,
  "friends_list" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs of friends */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Suspended, Banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
